failed_attempts.sql:
WITH ranked_profiles AS (
	SELECT r.profile_id AS profile_id,
			ts_rank(r.biography_lexemes, q) AS rank
	FROM profile r
	JOIN profile_relationship ro ON r.id = ro.origin_profile_id
	JOIN profile_rp ON rp.id = ro.destination_profile_id
	on
	WHERE rp.biography @> to_tsquery('english', :search_term)
),
	ranked_search_profiles AS (
	SELECT DISTINCT p.*,
		ts_rank(p.description_lexemes, :search_text) AS rank
	FROM publications p
	WHERE description @@ to_tsquery('english', :search_text)
)
SELECT profile_id AS profile_id FROM ranked_profiles WHERE rank > 0.1 AND rp.num_posts > 100 ORDER BY rank DESC LIMIT 10;

failed_attempts.sql: SELECT p.profile_id AS profile_id FROM profile p JOIN publication_collab pc ON p.id = pc.profile_id JOIN publication pub ON pc.publication_id = pub.id WHERE ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', :search_term)) > 0.1 AND (ts_rank(pub.description_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'fitness')) * 2 + pub.num_likes / 1000 + pub.num_comments / 1000) ORDER BY (ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', :search_term))) DESC LIMIT 10;
